sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54028" key="kataqru/bw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταθρύβω</orth>, <sense id="n54028.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καταθρύπτω, λάγανον</ref> </xr> Bilabel <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ὀψαρτ</foreign>.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:p.11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
